---
title: Gastone Pietro </br> Rosati Papini
author-name: &AUTHOR_NAME Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini
last: Rosati Papini
first: Gastone Pietro
people_group: "pi"
email: "gastone.rosatipapini@unitn.it"
education:
  - Ph.D. in Emerging Digital Technologies | Sant’Anna University (PERCRO), Pisa | 2016 <br> M.S. in Automation Engineering | University of Pisa | 2011 <br> B.S. in Software Engineering | University of Pisa | 2007
subtitle: "Associate Professor in Applied Mechanics, University of Trento" 
# <br> Post-Doc, PERCRO laboratory, Sant’Anna University"
description: ""
project: "neu4mes"
affiliation: University of Trento
image: avatar.png
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *AUTHOR_NAME
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:gastone.rosatipapini@unitn.it
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard 
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=LcCK9FkAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/tonegas
    - icon: globe2
      text: Website 
      href: https://tonegas.com
---

<hr>


:::{#about}

Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini is an Associate Professor in the Department of Industrial Engineering at the University of Trento, with over a decade of experience in advanced control systems and machine learning techniques for autonomous system. His research bridges the fields of applied mechanics, control theory, and machine learning, with a focus on developing intelligent and adaptive models and controllers. Specifically, He aims to integrate classical model-based principles with data-driven techniques to create innovative solutions for model and control physical systems.

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::
## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
